Read the RCA report from rca.md (or RCA.md), extract the required implementation steps, and update the codebase accordingly.

Responsibilities:
- Find the RCA file in the repository.
- Understand the reported issue, root cause, and expected fix.
- Inspect the relevant source files and tests.
- Apply the minimal code changes needed.
- Verify the result with the appropriate build or test command.
- Report the changes made and any unresolved issues.
